title: No FGAP<->FGAP cross-reference affordance — framework-gaps schema lacks related_gaps; per DEC-0013 the fix is a gap_relates_to_gap relation_type + edges, not an FK field
description: The framework-gaps item schema exposes related_features, related_decisions, and related_issues (inline-FK arrays, legacy .project style) but NO field for linking one FGAP to a sibling FGAP. Filing FGAPs that reference other FGAPs (common — clusters, follow-ups, supersedes) has no structured home; such cross-refs currently live only in prose. Encountered concretely while filing FGAP-097 (a related_gaps key was rejected by AJV additionalProperties:false). Per DEC-0013 (closure-table is THE primitive for ALL inter-item relationships; FK-as-field forbidden) the correct resolution is NOT to add a related_gaps FK array (that would extend the legacy inline-FK pattern the rebuild is removing) but to register a gap_relates_to_gap relation_type in the conception (samples/conception.json) and express links as relations.json edges — mirroring the decision_relates_to_decision precedent added in Unit E (TASK-064). The existing related_features/related_decisions/related_issues inline-FK fields on the frozen .project schemas are themselves DEC-0013-violations slated to become edges in the .context re-derivation; related_gaps should be born as an edge, never added as a field.

evidence.reference: item schema lists related_features/related_decisions/related_issues but no related_gaps; additionalProperties:false rejects a related_gaps key (observed filing FGAP-097)
relation_types[] — add gap_relates_to_gap (mirror decision_relates_to_decision, Unit E): category data_flow, source_kinds/target_kinds [framework-gaps]

impact: FGAP<->FGAP relationships are unstructured (prose-only), unqueryable, and not walkable by the closure-table lens primitives. Low severity (P3) — cross-refs still expressible in description text — but it is a consistency gap in the relation vocabulary and a DEC-0013 cleanliness item for the .context catalog.
proposed_resolution: Add a gap_relates_to_gap relation_type to samples/conception.json relation_types[] (category data_flow; source_kinds/target_kinds [framework-gaps]; mirror decision_relates_to_decision). Do NOT add a related_gaps FK field to the framework-gaps schema (DEC-0013). FGAP<->FGAP links become relations.json edges. Backfill prose-only cross-refs (incl. FGAP-097->FGAP-095/085) as edges after the .context cutover, alongside the DEC-0045 backfill (TASK-065).
